_comment: Copy these two keys into the CONSUMING repo's tracked .claude/settings.json (NOT settings.local.json) to auto-distribute commit-gate to your team. The repo below points at GhostlyGawd/commit-gate; change it if you fork. On clone + workspace-trust, teammates are prompted to install the marketplace and the plugin. Delete this _comment key. enabledPlugins is an OBJECT, not an array.
